title: 'Those Who Levelled Allegations are Running Away': Assam CM Sarma Slams Pawan Khera Amid Passport Row
description: Continuing his attack on Congress leader Pawan Khera for his allegations against his wife, Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma on Tuesday accused Khera of "running away" and alleged that the documents used to level accusations of multiple passports and foreign assets were "duplicate".
